# Hive SBI Unified Document Guide

This file serves as the master index for all technical and per-module documentation in this repository.

**Crucial Workflow Rule:** Before starting any major task that touches domain behavior, APIs, or data models, you must consult this guide and read the relevant documentation files *before* reading the code. The documentation provides the intended mental model.
